name: shell-header
description: Console application header: brand with prefix, dropdown nav menus, global icon actions, hamburger, skip-to-content

meta.name: ShellHeader
meta.description: Console application header: brand with prefix, dropdown nav menus, global icon actions, hamburger, skip-to-content

props.name: brand
props.description: Brand: { prefix?, name, href? } or free-form node

props.name: nav
props.description: Top nav: links or dropdown menus ({ label, items })

props.name: actions
props.description: Right-aligned global icon actions with aria-pressed

props.name: end
props.description: Free-form trailing slot (user menu, theme switcher)

props.name: onMenuClick
props.description: Renders the hamburger button; call shell.toggleSideNav

props.name: skipToContentHref
props.description: Skip-link target; false disables the link

examples.title: Console header
examples.code:
<ShellHeader
  brand={{ prefix: 'cascade', name: 'Console', href: '/' }}
  nav={[
    { label: 'Dashboard', href: '/dash', active: true },
    { label: 'Manage', items: [{ label: 'Users', href: '/users' }] },
  ]}
  actions={[{ id: 'notifications', label: 'Notifications', icon: <Bell /> }]}
/>
examples.description: Brand with prefix, dropdown nav, global icon action

whenToUse: Building console/admin app chrome with brand, dropdown nav, and global icon actions
Providing a hamburger that toggles a SideNav and a skip-to-content link
Hosting global controls (notifications, switcher, user menu) in one top bar
whenNotToUse: A simple marketing or app top bar — use Header

antiPatterns.bad: Reaching for ShellHeader on a basic landing page
antiPatterns.why: ShellHeader carries console machinery (dropdowns, icon actions, hamburger) that is overkill for simple sites

related.name: SideNav
related.reason: The hamburger toggles a SideNav in the app shell

related.name: Header
related.reason: Header is the simpler top bar for non-console apps

intent.a11yRationale: role="banner" landmarks the header; nav dropdowns expose aria-expanded, icon actions use aria-pressed, the hamburger reports aria-expanded, and a skip-to-content link lets keyboard users bypass the chrome

flexibility.note: Brand, nav, actions, and end are composable and optional
Surfaces, sizing, and accent must resolve to --cascade-* shell tokens
